t_ch: 年轻人相信你，就像你相信*我*。如果你不愿离去，他们也会一直留在这神殿中，变成{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}矛下的亡魂。
t_en: The young place their trust in you just as you place your trust in us. If you stay, they will remain here too, doomed to fall under {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s spear.

t_ch: …如果这是您的「神谕」，我没有不听从的道理。
t_en: If that is "divine will," then I have no reason to disobey.

t_ch: 大祭司大人，请再一次…带领我们启翅远行吧。
t_en: High priest, please guide us once again as we spread our wings on this long journey.

t_ch: 诺杜斯先生，您平安无事就好。
t_en: Mr. Noldus, I'm glad you're all right.

t_ch: 维尔图斯，我依然不认同你的做法。但罢了，就让我们给予黄金裔足够的信任吧。
t_en: Virtus, I still disagree with your methods, but it doesn't matter now. Let us place our trust in the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 接应我们的大地兽商队还没到，大家先待在安全处歇息一会儿吧。
t_en: The dromas caravan that's supposed to meet us isn't here yet, so let's all rest where it's safe for a while.

t_ch: 可惜，我们的疑问仍没得到解答，反而变得更多了。既然风波已经平息，可否请两位拨冗解惑？
t_en: Regrettably, our questions are still unanswered, and now we have even more. Now that things have calmed down, perhaps you two can find the time to answer a few of them?

t_ch: 当然，请来这边。
t_en: Of course. Please come this way.

t_ch: 看来二位已经觉察了我们的苦衷，感谢理解。作为回报，想知道什么就尽管问吧。
t_en: I see you've both been made aware of our troubles. I'm grateful for your understanding, so in return, please ask me anything you wish to know.

t_ch: 末世是什么意思？
t_en: What is this "end times" people spoke of?

t_ch: 就是字面意思，末日来临前的挣扎时代。
t_en: Just as the word implies, it's the time of strife before the world meets its end.

t_ch: 该死的「终末」还在追我……
t_en: The darn Finality is still after me...

t_ch: 贝洛伯格二周目？
t_en: Is this the sequel to Belobog?

t_ch: 你是说，你们的文明面临着末日？
t_en: Are you saying your civilization is coming to an end?

t_ch: 确切地说，是整个世界将要终结。
t_en: To be precise, it's the whole world that's coming to an end.

t_ch: 泰坦是什么？
t_en: What are the Titans?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的旧神，人类曾经的信仰，如今的敌人。
t_en: The ancient gods of Amphoreus, once worshiped by humanity, they now stand as their foes.

t_ch: 黄金裔是什么？
t_en: Who are the Chrysos Heirs?

t_ch: 预言中，流淌着黄金血的救世之人。
t_en: The prophetic Deliverers, with golden blood coursing through their veins.

t_ch: 刚才的神迹是什么？
t_en: What is the miracle performed earlier?

t_ch: 是「命运三泰坦」的馈赠。在它们的赐福下，祭司能唤醒旧日的重影，改变现实。
t_en: It's a gift from the Three Titans of Fate. With their blessings, priests can awaken shadows of the past to alter reality.

t_ch: 你说的也太轻巧了，别把神迹当成能随意使用的工具！
t_en: You're putting it too lightly. Don't make miracles sound like a tool you can simply use at will.

t_ch: 先问这些吧。
t_en: That's all the questions I have for now.

t_ch: 你的回答也太简洁了……
t_en: Your answers are too concise...

t_ch: 抱歉，可能我不是特别擅长讲故事吧。
t_en: I'm sorry. I guess I'm not good at telling stories.

t_ch: 但枯燥又冗长的讲解也不好。让我想想……
t_en: Yet, a tedious and overly long explanation isn't ideal either. Let me think...

t_ch: 对了！维尔图斯他们是雅努萨波利斯的祭司，里拉琴一定弹得很好，不如为两位朋友弹奏一曲。
t_en: Right! Virtus and the others are priests from Janusopolis. They should be adept at playing the lyre. How about playing a song for our two friends?

t_ch: 在翁法罗斯，自古流传着这样一首诗歌……
t_en: There's a ballad that's been passed down in Amphoreus since ancient times...

t_ch: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
t_en: "Happiness abound in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."

t_ch: 「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
t_en: "Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."

t_ch: 「它们说：世界太过沉寂。只愿见，生灵欢笑不息。」
t_en: "They declared the world too unstirring, hence wished endless laughter upon the living."

t_ch: 「于是便有了我、你，编织言语和歌谣，诞下爱情与知己。」
t_en: "Thus you and I were created, with words and song to weave, and love and intimacy to give."

t_ch: 「自此，创生已毕。谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻？」
t_en: "Thus, creation was complete, who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole?"

t_ch: 「伟岸的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，全知的父，它身躯伟岸，却甘将眼睑垂低。」
t_en: "O great {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, all-knowing father of stature so tall, yet low does their gaze willingly fall."

t_ch: 「黎明的光沉负于肩，金色的血落向大地——」
t_en: "With light of dawn heavy upon their shoulders, golden ichor spills unto the land..."

t_ch: 「——汇作一条滚烫的河，流遍世间英雄末裔……」
t_en: "...forming the boiling river that flows through the legacies of heroes who take their stand..."
...Hmm?

t_ch: 什么动静？！
t_en: What's that sound!?

t_ch: 哪来的舞台效果？
t_en: What's with the stage effects?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，别紧张！是我们的救兵来了。大家起身吧！
t_en: Hahaha! Don't worry. That's just our rescue. Time to get up, everyone!

t_ch: 好壮观的生物。
t_en: What magnificent creatures.

t_ch: 这些温吞的大家伙叫「大地兽」，是人类忠实的伙伴。前往圣城的山路崎岖，得拜托它们了。
t_en: These large mild-mannered creatures are called dromas. They're humanity's most loyal companions. We'll be relying on them to get us through the rugged mountain roads on the way to the holy city.

t_ch: 大地兽性格温驯，哪怕第一次骑乘也能轻松驾驭。来试试吧，记得握紧缰绳。
t_en: Dromas are very docile, even first-time riders can steer them easily. Here, give it a try. Remember to hold the reins tight.

t_ch: 呜嗡——
t_en: Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

t_ch: 骑乘大地兽。
t_en: Ride the dromas.

t_ch: 你看见大地兽四肢突出的白色甲壳，打算把它当作脚蹬……
t_en: You see all the white shells jutting out from the dromas' limbs and plan to use them as footholds...

t_ch: 呜嗡——！
t_en: Urrhh!

t_ch: …大地兽发出不满的叫声，轻轻一晃就把你甩开了数米远。
t_en: The dromas lets out a dissatisfied growl and easily tosses you several meters away.

t_ch: 这就是你说的「温驯」？！
t_en: This is your idea of docile!?

t_ch: 好小子，还好我闪得快。
t_en: Why you! It's a good thing I managed to dodge quickly.

t_ch: 忘说了，千万别碰白色的石脊。「大地」泰坦赐福它们的时候，把坏脾气全都塞进这些硬块里了。
t_en: I forgot to mention. Don't touch their white stone humps. When the Earth Titan blessed these creatures, it's said they also stuffed their ill tempers into these humps.

t_ch: 呜嗡——
t_en: Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

t_ch: （小心地）骑乘大地兽。
t_en: Carefully ride the dromas.

t_ch: 看吧，是不是很轻松？
t_en: See? Easy, wasn't it?

t_ch: 各位，刚才的里拉琴，奏得还行吧？我们流亡多日，许久没碰过乐器，兴许手艺生疏，献丑了。
t_en: Everyone, how did you find our lyre performance earlier? We've been in exile for many days and haven't touched our instruments in a long time. I fear our skills have grown rusty, and we've made a spectacle of ourselves.

t_ch: 哪里哪里，先生演奏得非常好！
t_en: No, not at all! Your performance was wonderful, sir!

t_ch: 我们很久没有像刚才那样围坐在一起，纵情吟唱古老歌谣了，感谢各位让我重新回忆起和平辉煌的年代。现在想想，是我之前过于偏执了。
t_en: It's been a long time since we sat together like that and sang ancient ballads to our heart's content. I'm grateful to all of you for reminding me of those glorious and peaceful times. Looking back now, I admit I was too stubborn.

t_ch: 也许各位真能从末日手中解救翁法罗斯。就像今日，四位英雄拯救了我们的生命和信仰。
t_en: Perhaps you really can save Amphoreus from its doom, just like how the four of you heroes saved our very lives and faith today.

t_ch: 我俩也被算进去了？
t_en: He even included the two of us!

t_ch: 虽然没明白，但展开还不坏。
t_en: I don't really get it, but at least things unfolded quite nicely.

t_ch: 痛苦是有害的，苦难并不能使信仰变得高尚。将大家从苦难中解放出来，正是我们这些黄金裔与生俱来的职责。
t_en: Suffering's bad for your health, and it won't help your faith much, either. That's why it's our inherent duty as Chrysos Heirs to free everyone from suffering.

t_ch: 也是如今唯一的人类城邦，<color=#dbc291ff>「圣城」奥赫玛</color>存在的意义。
t_en: It's also the reason for the <color=#dbc291ff>holy city Okhema</color>'s existence — the only human city left in our present day.

t_ch: 哎呀，别把气氛弄得这么沉重嘛。总之，{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}圣城{RUBY_E#}是绝对安全的，到那里就没事啦。
t_en: Hey now, don't be so serious. You're bringing the mood down. Anyway, in short, {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city{RUBY_E#} is absolutely safe. Everything will be fine once we get there.

t_ch: 大伙儿都坐稳了吗？那我们就出发吧——目的地，奥赫玛！
t_en: Is everyone properly seated? Then we're off! Next stop: Okhema!

t_ch: 你终于有惊无险地骑上了大地兽。
t_en: You finally manage to ride the dromas safely.

t_ch: 跃上大地兽。
t_en: Hop on the dromas.

t_ch: 小心动静。
t_en: Stay quiet.

t_ch: 慢…门开了？
t_en: Hold on. It opened on its own?

t_ch: 好黑，现在是晚上么……
t_en: Why is it so dark? Is it nighttime already...?

t_ch: …什么？
t_en: ...Wha?

t_ch: 那边，粉色的。
t_en: Over there. That pink thing.

t_ch: 你也能看见？
t_en: You see it, too?

t_ch: 嗯，不是幻觉。
t_en: Yes, it's not an illusion.

t_ch: 又来了，是它做的？这种现象…难以解释。
t_en: There it is again. Is it doing all of this? This phenomenon... is hard to explain.

t_ch: 看对面，好壮观的城门。
t_en: Hmm, now that's one monumental city gate.

t_ch: 压迫感十足，又相当古旧…是当地的某种文化建筑吗？
t_en: Imposing and somewhat archaic... Could it be a cultural site?

t_ch: 还有那座城门，也记录下来吧。
t_en: Don't forget the city gate, too.

t_ch: 不，我绝对不同意……
t_en: No, I will never agree to that...

t_ch: 这是…不可思议。
t_en: This is... unbelievable.

t_ch: 两位朋友！千万别离*我们*太远哦。
t_en: My two friends, don't stray too far away from us!

t_ch: 两位，身手真不错！
t_en: You both have impressive fighting skills!

t_ch: 如果武器还在就更好了。
t_en: It would be better if I still had my weapon.

t_ch: 啊，抱歉……
t_en: Oh, I'm sorry...

t_ch: 怎、怎么会…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祷言失效了吗？
t_en: H—How is that possible... Did {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} prayer fail?

t_ch: 别慌张！跟在那位大人身边就不会有事。
t_en: Stop panicking! As long as we're with them, we'll be fine.

t_ch: 这种日子什么时候是个头……
t_en: When will days like these finally come to an end...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}啊，若您还在世……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, if only you were still here with us...

t_ch: …泰坦，请保佑我的族人们……
t_en: ...Titan, please bless my people...

t_ch: 再坚持一会儿，马上就能离开了
t_en: Hang on, you'll be able to leave soon

t_ch: 一动不动的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
t_en: A humanoid statue that does not move. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

t_ch: 姿势莫名幽默的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
t_en: A humanoid statue with a rather comical pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

t_ch: 动作张扬的人形雕像，不知道有没有危险，还是别太靠近了。
t_en: A humanoid statue with a flamboyant pose. You can't tell whether it's dangerous. Best not to get too close.

t_ch: 是眼花了吗，你总觉得它们的位置变了。还是别太靠近了。
t_en: Are your eyes playing tricks on you? You keep thinking that their positions have changed. Best not to get too close.

t_ch: 愿雅努斯揭示我们的路径。
t_en: May Janus reveal our road.

t_ch: 这样的日子什么时候是个头……
t_en: When will this end...?

t_ch: 神殿好冷……
t_en: The temple is so cold...

t_ch: 命运会将我们带往何处啊……
t_en: Where will fate take us...?

t_ch: 救救我们吧，万径之门……
t_en: Save us, Gate of Infinity...

t_ch: 我已经走不动了。
t_en: I can't walk anymore.

t_ch: 好好休息，会有办法的。
t_en: Rest up. There will be a way out of this.

t_ch: 孩子，要抱有希望……
t_en: Have hope, child...

t_ch: 雅努斯…会为我们指示未来吗？
t_en: Will Janus... show us the future?

t_ch: 终于能离开这里了！
t_en: We can finally get out of here!

t_ch: 希望奥赫玛是个安全的地方。
t_en: Hopefully, Okhema is a safe place.

t_ch: 尊神啊，请善待我等的命运……
t_en: O gods, please have mercy on our destiny...

t_ch: 大地兽的脊背如同摇篮，你逐渐睡去，而商队经过一段时间的跋涉也即将抵达奥赫玛……
t_en: The back of a dromas is like a cradle. You gradually fall asleep, and the caravan will arrive at Okhema after some travel time...

t_ch: 很神奇吧！来到这里，就能安静说话了……
t_en: Amazing, isn't it? Now that we're here, we can speak in peace...

t_ch: 咦，怎么感觉安静过头了？
t_en: Huh? But why does it feel a little too quiet?

t_ch: 二位如此勇武，莫非是异邦的黄金裔？
t_en: You both fought so bravely. Are you Chrysos Heirs from a foreign land?

t_ch: 求求你们，救救奥赫玛吧，疯王{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}回来了，看哪，混乱、纷争，到处都是……
t_en: Please, I beg of you! Save Okhema! The mad king {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has returned! Look! There's strife and conflict everywhere...

t_ch: 冷静些。这里交给我们，你快去避难。
t_en: Stay calm and leave this to us. You must hurry and find shelter.

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢…二位的同袍正在城中战斗，命运会指引你们相聚。
t_en: Thank you, thank you... Your comrades are fighting inside the city. Fate will guide you to them.

t_ch: 还以为圣城是座坚固的庇护所，没想到这么不太平。我们就留在战场搭把手吧。
t_en: I expected the holy city to be a strong sanctuary, but things are less peaceful than I thought. Let's stay here and lend our support on the battlefield.

t_ch: 断枪还在身上吗？
t_en: Do you still have your broken spear?

t_ch: 都是些小卒，云吟术足以应付。
t_en: They're just minions. My cloudhymn magic will be sufficient.

t_ch: 他把我们当成黄金裔了。
t_en: He thought we were Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 「预言中的救世之人」…看来白厄他们深受民众信赖。
t_en: "The Deliverers mentioned in the prophecy"... It seems the people have a lot of faith in Phainon and the others.

t_ch: 这尼卡多利不会和「毁灭」有关吧…
t_en: Do you think this Nikador is related to the Destruction?

t_ch: 我不这么认为，这些眷属和反物质军团的差别挺明显的。
t_en: I don't think so. These Titankin have obvious differences to the Antimatter Legion.

t_ch: 当务之急，先和白厄汇合。
t_en: Our priority now is to find Phainon.

t_ch: 主干道被堵住了！缇宝老师……
t_en: The main road's been blocked off! Tribbie...

t_ch: 不慌不慌，交给*我们*吧——「我呼唤你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！」
t_en: Don't panic. Leave this to us! "I summon thee, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!"

t_ch: 「揭开记忆的帷幕——」
t_en: "Lift thy curtain of memory—"

t_ch: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: ——「揭开帷幕，激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: "...Lift the curtain and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: 情况如何？
t_en: How's the situation?

t_ch: 二位…抱歉，又把你们卷进来了。
t_en: It's you two... I'm sorry we got you involved again.

t_ch: 没想到{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会在这时候率领军队，突袭圣城…它向来是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的死敌，如今竟疯溃得像匹恶兽。
t_en: I never expected {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} to lead an army and launch a surprise attack on the holy city at a time like this... They and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} have always been mortal enemies, but now they've gone mad like a vicious beast.

t_ch: 我们解决了一些敌人。
t_en: We took care of some enemies.

t_ch: 感激不尽。幸亏奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
t_en: You have my gratitude. Thankfully, Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

t_ch: 这下人类一败涂地了。
t_en: Humanity is so doomed.

t_ch: 不必惊慌，奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
t_en: There's no need to panic. Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

t_ch: 诺杜斯先生他们已经去避难了。后面交给*我们*，你们也快和市民一同撤离吧！
t_en: Mr. Noldus and the others have gone to seek shelter. Leave the rest to us. You should evacuate along with the citizens.

t_ch: 我们可以帮忙。
t_en: We can help.

t_ch: 你们身边更安全。
t_en: It's safer by your side.

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}的意思是，我们可以帮忙。
t_en: What {F#she}{M#he} meant to say is: We can help.

t_ch: 但我渴望战斗！
t_en: But I thirst for battle!

t_ch: 我不怀疑两位的身手，只是……
t_en: I don't doubt your skills but...

t_ch: 好吧，但请不要离开我身边。那些渣滓奈何不了你们，但我们的同伴，那些以「黄金裔」为名的人们……
t_en: Very well, but please remain by my side. These pests can't hurt you, but our companions, those known as the "Chrysos Heirs"...

t_ch: 他们的攻击可不分敌我。
t_en: Their attacks do not discriminate between friend and foe.

t_ch: 你们在做什么？这里不安全，快去避难吧。
t_en: What are you doing? It's not safe here. Seek shelter, quickly!

t_ch: 不不不，这里很安全。
t_en: No, no, no, it's very safe here.

t_ch: 预言已然昭示，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的威光将照拂一切……
t_en: The prophecy has already revealed that the light of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} will shine upon all...

t_ch: 看吧！没有人会死去，英雄们会守护这座城邦！
t_en: Watch! No one will die. The heroes will protect the city!

t_ch: 由他们去吧。就像诺杜斯先生崇敬{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}一样，在摇摇欲坠的末世，信仰已是一些人生命的全部。
t_en: Leave them be. Just as Mr. Noldus reveres {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, faith is all some people have left in a world teetering on the brink of collapse.

t_ch: 而不辜负他们的信任，就是我等黄金裔的职责——「纷争」的爪牙，休想伤及民众分毫！
t_en: To honor their faith is the sacred duty of the Chrysos Heirs— Minions of Strife, you shall not harm these people!

t_ch: 真是尸横遍野，正门前不该有这么多敌人的。负责守城的人去哪了？
t_en: Bodies everywhere. How could so many enemies have made it to the front gates? Where were the city guards?

t_ch: 小白——
t_en: Snowy...

t_ch: 我们，回来了。
t_en: We're back.

t_ch: 三、三个缇宝？！
t_en: Th—Three Tribbies!?

t_ch: 这是什么把戏？！
t_en: Is this a trick!?

t_ch: *我们*是缇安！
t_en: We are Trianne!

t_ch: *我们*是缇宁。
t_en: We are Trinnon!

t_ch: *我们*是缇宝——不对，现在哪是自我介绍的时候！
t_en: We are Tribbie— Wait, no, now is not the time for introductions!

t_ch: …翁法罗斯的惊喜越来越多了。
t_en: ...The surprises never cease in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 小白！小敌跟大部队打了几十个来回，一路从天上打到了城里！你快去帮帮他呀！
t_en: Snowy, De has been trading blows with the main forces for what feels like forever, from the skies to the city! Hurry up and assist him!

t_ch: 我就知道…那家伙杀心一起就不顾一切。三位老师，安置市民的工作拜托你们了。
t_en: I knew it... He gets reckless once he gets the urge to kill. I'm relying on you three to handle the task of getting the citizens to safety.

t_ch: 放心吧！有我们在呢，只要用「百界门」，啪的一下就能把大伙儿送去翁法罗斯最安全的地方——
t_en: Don't worry! With us here, we can just use the Century Gate to whoosh the people to the safest place in Amphoreus—

t_ch: 那不就是奥赫玛吗？
t_en: Wouldn't that be Okhema?

t_ch: ——别闹了，赶紧救人吧！哪里都行，快把大家送去安全的地方！
t_en: Stop messing around and help the people! Anywhere is fine, just send them to somewhere safe!

t_ch: 放心吧，虽然有些孩童心性，但缇宝老师在黄金裔中也称得上资历深厚，更是奥赫玛的支柱之一。她们值得信赖。
t_en: Don't worry. Although they are a little childish, the trio are experienced Chrysos Heirs and one of the pillars of Okhema. Therefore, they can definitely be trusted.

t_ch: 两位，我们继续前进。
t_en: Well, let's keep on moving then.

t_ch: 对哦，那还要我们做什么？
t_en: Right, then what do you even need us for?

t_ch: 白、白厄阁下！你终于来了，快救救大工匠，他被敌人围住了——
t_en: L—Lord Phainon! You're finally here. Quick, save the Grand Craftsman! He's surrounded by enemies—

t_ch: 什么？！
t_en: What!?

t_ch: 哈托努斯！
t_en: Chartonus!

t_ch: 白厄……
t_en: Phainon...

t_ch: 你没事就好……
t_en: I'm glad that you're okay...

t_ch: 至于你，万敌…如果我没记错，你的责任应当是保护市民吧？
t_en: As for you, Mydei... If I'm not mistaken, shouldn't your responsibility be protecting the citizens?

t_ch: 什么意思，你想说这里哪个不算市民？
t_en: What is that supposed to mean? Who are you implying isn't a citizen here?

t_ch: 这儿的人名一个赛一个奇怪。
t_en: The names of the people here keep getting stranger and stranger.

t_ch: 答非所问。阿格莱雅叫我们庇护民众，你只作耳旁风么？
t_en: Don't evade the question. Aglaea told us to protect the citizens. Are you ignoring what she said?

t_ch: 是你漏了半句，「保护市民，扫清外敌」——她的原话。解决掉{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，圣城危机自可迎刃而解。
t_en: It is you who forget the second half of her words. Her original words were, "Protect the citizens and eliminate the invaders." The crisis in the holy city will be resolved once we've eliminated {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 话又说回来，既然你压根没把那边两位当作「市民」……
t_en: Speaking of which, since you've never considered the pair over there to be "citizens"...

t_ch: 那他们似乎也符合「外敌」的定义。
t_en: They seem to fit the definition of "invaders."

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#缇宁，缇宝，缇安}雅努斯的三位祭司{RUBY_E#}，同面同心，耳目相连。你们的一举一动早已暴露在奥赫玛人的视线下。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Trinnon, Tribbie, Trianne}The three priests of Janus{RUBY_E#} share the same appearance and mind, and their senses are also interlinked. The Okhemans have long been aware of your presence and what you have been doing.

t_ch: 看着还挺信任他？劝你们三思。
t_en: You trust him that much? I suggest you think twice.

t_ch: 这种火烧眉毛的时刻挑衅盟友，你把自己当什么了？
t_en: Provoking your allies at such a critical juncture. Whose side are you on?

t_ch: 自打相识起，我就告诉过你们，无论过往抑或未来，悬锋人都不可能同意与你们握手言和……
t_en: From the moment we first met, I already told you that regardless of whether it's in the past or in the future, the people of Kremnos will never agree to make peace with the likes of you...

t_ch: ——我，万敌，身为悬锋的继业者，无法在这种问题上独断专行。况且到了这份上，我更有必要提醒各位*贵客*，你们的东道主可谈不上精于待客之道。
t_en: As the successor of Kremnos, I, Mydei, am not able to act independently on such matters. Furthermore, things have escalated to a point where I must warn you, esteemed guests, that your host is anything but proficient in the ways of hospitality.

t_ch: 够了…内讧的时候，现在不是。疯王没有溃退…必须阻止它，黄金裔……
t_en: Enough... The time for internal strife, now is not. Still on the offense, the mad king is and must be stopped by the Chrysos Heirs...

t_ch: 我没忘正事，退下吧。前方有我足矣。
t_en: I have not forgotten about what needs to be done. Stand down. I'm more than capable of taking care of what's ahead by myself.

t_ch: 至于你…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就在云石天宫，阿格莱雅让我别再插手。尽管去吧…「救世主」。
t_en: As for you... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is in the Marmoreal Palace. Aglaea told me to stay out of it. So, go ahead... "Deliverer."

t_ch: 不用你多说。
t_en: I don't need you to tell me that.

t_ch: 对了，你叫什么名字？
t_en: You, what's your name?

t_ch: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
t_en: My name is {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 不也挺奇怪？
t_en: Is that not also strange?

t_ch: 银河球棒侠！
t_en: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

t_ch: 不也挺奇怪？
t_en: Is that not also strange?

t_ch: 嘿，不告诉你！
t_en: Heh, it's a secret!

t_ch: 你叫这名，不也挺奇怪？
t_en: Isn't that name... also strange?

t_ch: 怎么了，外邦人，畏惧{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}的怒火，还是想跟我练练手？
t_en: What is it, outsider? Do you fear the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}'s raging flames? Or perhaps you'd care to spar with me?

t_ch: 不必了…
t_en: No, thank you...

t_ch: 有点兴趣。
t_en: I'm interested.

t_ch: 用余波震碎它们！
t_en: Shatter them with the aftershocks!

t_ch: 别和万敌较真，因为他真的不开玩笑。
t_en: Avoid getting too serious with Mydei, because he means every word he says.

t_ch: 这倒是句实话，信也无妨。
t_en: That is true. Of this, you can be assured.

t_ch: 抱歉，我们的动作还是太慢了。
t_en: I'm sorry, we were not quick enough.

t_ch: 为时不晚。交给我们。动身吧，白厄。
t_en: It's not too late. Leave it to us. Go, Phainon.

t_ch: 好在无人伤亡。希望万敌只是嘴上说说，他是无可挑剔的战士，但如果铁了心要我行我素…恐怕没人能阻止他，就算是我。
t_en: Thankfully, no one was hurt. I hope that Mydei doesn't act on his words. After all, he's an exemplary fighter, if he's dead set on doing things his way... I fear not a soul could prevent it, not even myself.

t_ch: …一片狼藉啊。
t_en: ...What a mess.

t_ch: 看不到居民，已经疏散了吗？
t_en: I don't see any more residents. Have they been evacuated?

t_ch: 是的。缇宝老师的动作很快。
t_en: Yes. Tribbie acted with haste.

t_ch: 这里是云石市集，圣城重要的聚居地和生活场所。如果强行突围，一定会造成不必要的损失……
t_en: This is Marmoreal Market, the most important residential and living area in the holy city. Pushing through by force would undoubtedly result in needless casualties...

t_ch: …但我们的援军来了。
t_en: ...But now our backup is here.

t_ch: 白厄阁下。还有…两位客人。
t_en: Lord Phainon. And... the two guests.

t_ch: 欢迎来到奥赫玛。
t_en: Welcome to Okhema.

t_ch: 这些敌人…一动不动？
t_en: These enemies... aren't moving?

t_ch: 听见你的脚步声时，我还以为自己的英雄史诗尚未开启，就要被死神写下「终章」二字了……
t_en: When I heard your footsteps, I thought Death was already writing my final chapter before my heroic journey had even begun...

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐。
t_en: Miss Castorice.

t_ch: 一段史诗如果在开篇就戛然而止，也许会令人惊叹不已。
t_en: An abrupt ending to an epic that has barely begun might also amaze the people.

t_ch: 但今天，白厄阁下…奥赫玛需要你。
t_en: But today, Lord Phainon... Okhema needs you.

t_ch: 连圣城的「入殓师」都这么说，看来我是能活过这一战了？
t_en: Well, if the "mortician" of the holy city says I'm needed, then it sounds like I'm gonna live through this mess.

t_ch: 嗯…这不由我决定，我能做的只是摒除障碍，领你去往{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的降临之所。
t_en: Well... that isn't for me to decide. All I can do is clear the obstacles and guide you to the place of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s descent.

t_ch: 两位客人，也请一起来，跟在我身后……
t_en: Dear guests, if you would, I'd like you to please follow me...

t_ch: 请保持五步之遥。
t_en: And kindly keep five paces distance.

t_ch: 遐蝶散发出的阴冷气息令你感到不妙，冥冥之中，似乎有一大片黑暗将要把你吞没……
t_en: The chilling aura emanating from Castorice fills you with unease. In the depths of your mind, it feels as though an overwhelming darkness is about to engulf you...

t_ch: 现在不是冒险的时候。也许你该遵从她的建议，保持安全距离。
t_en: Now isn't the time to take risks. Maybe you should have followed her advice and kept a safe distance.

t_ch: 血污的气息…你是，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯之手{RUBY_E#}的指侍？
t_en: The scent of blood... Are you an attendant of the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: …我不是任何人的侍从。
t_en: ...No, I'm nobody's attendant.

t_ch: 尽可掩饰，逃避。你分明来自，死者的世界。
t_en: You can try to avoid and hide it, but you obviously came from the world of the dead.

t_ch: 奥赫玛，黄金裔，一群懦夫。忠诚和荣耀，铸就我们。欺瞒和软弱，捏成你们。
t_en: Okhema, Chrysos Heirs — what cowards. We live by loyalty and glory, while you live by weakness and deceit.

t_ch: 幸好你不是我的历史老师，沉沦于疯狂的家伙，说出来的话能有几分可信？
t_en: I'm so glad that you're not my history teacher. How much can we trust the words of someone who has sunk so deep into madness?

t_ch: 但如果是忠诚和荣耀驱使你站在这里——那就拔出武器，我会赐你一个战士的结局。
t_en: However, if you're standing here out of loyalty and glory, then I shall draw my blade and grant you a warrior's end.

t_ch: 来——拔剑！
t_en: Come, to arms!

t_ch: 如你所愿。
t_en: As you wish.

t_ch: …阿格莱雅大人说过，你的时间十分宝贵，不应被无谓的冲突烦扰。
t_en: Lady Aglaea once said that your time is extremely valuable and shouldn't be wasted on unnecessary conflict.

t_ch: 我可以让它安息。
t_en: I have the power to lay them to rest.

t_ch: 这也是我想说的，犯不着在这些小卒身上使用你的力量。
t_en: I was about to say the same. It's pointless to waste your strength on these pawns.

t_ch: 走吧，该去直面「纷争」了。
t_en: Let's go. It's time to face Strife.

t_ch: 那里……
t_en: Once there...

t_ch: …你们要化作鸟儿，飞入最后的战场。
t_en: ...You must turn into birds and fly toward the final battlefield.

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐，不和我们一起吗？
t_en: Miss Castorice, why aren't you joining us?

t_ch: 我得留在这里，确保这些士兵不会破坏城市。
t_en: I must stay here and ensure that these soldiers do not destroy the city.

t_ch: 虽然信仰对大多数人更重要…但也有许多市民更在意身外之物。
t_en: Although faith is more important to the vast majority, there are still quite a number of citizens who care more about their worldly possessions.

t_ch: 我理解，只是……
t_en: I understand, but...

t_ch: 请放心，市民已经疏散了，附近的生灵…只有你们三位。
t_en: There is no need for worry. The citizens have already been evacuated and the only living things in the vicinity... are the three of you.

t_ch: 不会有人被波及，这也是阿格莱雅大人的指示。
t_en: As Lady Aglaea instructed, no civilians will be affected by this.

t_ch: …失礼了。
t_en: ...Do excuse my impropriety.

t_ch: 那就回头再见了，遐蝶小姐。
t_en: Well then, I'll see you later, Miss Castorice.
Then...

t_ch: 各位，可以静静离开吗？
t_en: Could you all quietly leave?

t_ch: 这里交给遐蝶小姐，我们赶紧动身吧。
t_en: We'll leave this place to Miss Castorice then. Let's get a move on.

t_ch: 远方就是云石天宫，天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}…就在那里。
t_en: Marmoreal Palace, the Lance of Fury, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They're all there, in the distance.

t_ch: 什么声音？！
t_en: What's that sound!?

t_ch: 妈妈，我怕…
t_en: Mommy, I'm scared...

t_ch: 丹恒，你饿了吗？
t_en: Dan Heng, is that your stomach growling?

t_ch: 骇人的战吼。那就是泰坦？
t_en: What a horrifying battle cry. Is that a Titan?

t_ch: 那声战吼曾荡平战场，摧枯拉朽，将我的敌军和战友同时劈倒在地，人们脆弱得就像烈风下的芦苇。
t_en: That battle cry once crushed all in its path. It knocked down foes and allies alike, leaving people as fragile as reeds in a gale.

t_ch: 而那时的我，四肢震颤、兵戈脱手，耳边只余狂躁又可耻的心跳……
t_en: My limbs trembled uncontrollably as my weapon clattered to the ground. I could hear nothing but the frenzied and shameful beating of my own heart...

t_ch: 恐惧，这就是「纷争」泰坦受人敬仰的原因。若有勇士直面它的恐怖仍能迈出步伐，此后便再无试炼可动摇他手中的武器。
t_en: Fear, this is why the Strife Titan is revered. If a warrior can face this terror and still step forward, no trial thereafter can shake the weapon in their hand.

t_ch: 二位，若想退后，这是最后的机会了。
t_en: You two, if you wish to retreat, this is your final chance to do so.

t_ch: 没事，我都死过好几回了。
t_en: It's fine. I've already died a number of times before.

t_ch: 没事，他都死过好几回了。
t_en: It's fine. He's already died a number of times before.

t_ch: 这不能混为一谈……
t_en: These are separate matters...

t_ch: 看来两位确实遍历百险。
t_en: Looks like the both of you have indeed braved many dangers.

t_ch: 我们对泰坦的洗礼并无兴趣。向陌生的世界施以援手，只是身为「开拓者」的职责。
t_en: We have no interest in the Titan rites. As Trailblazers, lending a helping hand to unfamiliar worlds is simply our duty.

t_ch: 「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，想必那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
t_en: Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, there must also be a Titan which is revered by the masses?

t_ch: 无需再确认两位的决心了。我们即将与「纷争」的化身兵戎相见，可悬锋恫吓之下，你们的意志反而愈发耀眼。
t_en: There's no need to further confirm your resolve. We shall soon cross swords with the embodiment of Strife. And yet, faced against this menacing threat, your resolve only gleams more intensely.

t_ch: 出发吧。在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未沉默的年代，无人能当它的敌手。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
t_en: Let's get going. In the era when {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} had not yet fallen silent, none could stand as their equal. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
t_en: Stand with me and become heroes!

t_ch: 奥赫玛的两位新盟友，欢迎来到翁法罗斯。
t_en: New allies of Okhema, welcome to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 这场迎宾宴会算不上馨雅，但却帮助我们消除了疑虑。从现在起，你们便是圣城的贵客，黄金裔的上宾。
t_en: While this welcome banquet is far from elegant, it has helped to remove any misgivings that we had. From this moment forth, you shall be treated as distinguished guests of the holy city and of the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 你好，阿格莱雅女士。
t_en: Hello, Lady Aglaea.

t_ch: 女士，你的眼睛……
t_en: Lady Aglaea, your eyes...

t_ch: 她的眼神…
t_en: Her gaze...

t_ch: 有些涣散。难道说……
t_en: Is somewhat unfocused. Could it be that...

t_ch: 好奇这双眼眸吗？我并非双目失明，相反，能看见的远比常人更多。
t_en: Curious about my eyesight? Well, I'm not blind. On the contrary, I can see much more than the typical person.

t_ch: 淌着黄金血的人，总有异于凡众之处，在我身上便是「感官」。无需再借由光明丈量世界，风儿会顺着金线为我捎来讯息，将千丝万缕送往指尖。
t_en: Those with golden blood always have something extraordinary about them. For me, it's perception. I don't need light to measure the world — the wind carries messages along golden threads, delivering countless sensations to my fingertips.

t_ch: 就像此时此刻，两位的美德化作一股暖流，取悦了我的肌肤。
t_en: Just like how at this present moment, the virtues possessed by the both of you have turned into a warm current that pleases my skin.

t_ch: 她说话好文艺哦……
t_en: She sounds so cultured...

t_ch: 的确，和星期日不分高下。
t_en: Indeed, her manner of speaking is comparable to Sunday's.

t_ch: 都说了我是个{F#暖女}{M#暖男}。
t_en: See, I told you that I'm a heartwarming {F#girl}{M#guy} deep down.

t_ch: 她只是在用比喻……
t_en: She was just speaking metaphorically...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的分身……
t_en: A manifestation of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: …属于我的考验还没到来吗？
t_en: Could it be that my trial has not arrived yet?

t_ch: 沿着命运的一缕游丝，你落下了开篇的第一笔，感觉如何？
t_en: By following the threads of fate, you have begun to write the opening chapter of your story. How do you feel?

t_ch: 实话说，不怎么样，我还以为会更困难些。
t_en: Truth be told, I don't feel any different. I anticipated a greater challenge.

t_ch: 缇安老师尾随那些逃亡的士兵去了，这也是计划的一部分吗？
t_en: When Trianne followed those escaped soldiers, was that part of the plan too?

t_ch: 自然。我们对这场袭击早有预知，也不打算浪费一个绝好的机会。
t_en: Naturally. We have long foreseen this attack and didn't intend to waste such a golden opportunity.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}堕入疯狂后，它的堡垒便消失在了迷雾中，无人知晓其所在。但如今，它一反常态，主动向奥赫玛发起攻势……
t_en: After {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, their fortress disappeared into the fog, with no one being able to ascertain its location anymore. However, now that they have acted out of character and attacked Okhema of their own accord...

t_ch: 那圣城也将掘出它的藏身之处，吹响反攻的号角。
t_en: Then, the holy city shall also uncover their hiding place and sound the horn of retaliation.

t_ch: 真是一环扣一环啊。
t_en: What an intricate plan indeed.

t_ch: 我答应过他们，在时局安定后，要为我们的盟友解答翁法罗斯的一切。
t_en: I gave my word that after the situation stabilized, I would reveal all about Amphoreus to our allies.

t_ch: 但奥赫玛刚刚脱离一场劫难，还有许多惊魂未定的民众需要安抚。阿格莱雅，能请你代劳吗？
t_en: However, given that Okhema has just barely survived a calamity, and there are still many shaken citizens who need comfort... Aglaea, would you mind taking care of this in my stead?

t_ch: 两位贵客为圣城尽心尽力，我自然会招待好他们。
t_en: Distinguished guests, since you have spared no effort in aiding the holy city, I will naturally take care of you as well.

t_ch: 那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。
t_en: I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance.

t_ch: 两位，等听烦了故事就来云石市集找我吧。无论如何，我欠你们一次款待。
t_en: You two can find me at Marmoreal Market after you've grown tired of listening to her tales. In any case, I owe you my hospitality.

t_ch: 那么，我们该从何说起？
t_en: Now then, where should we begin?

t_ch: 这叫安全？！跟缇宝说的完全不一样啊！
t_en: You call this safe!? It's not how Tribbie described it at all!

t_ch: 是在重渊遇见的敌人…看来这场袭击也是「纷争」泰坦的手笔。
t_en: These are the enemies we met in the Abyss. It seems this attack is also the work of the Strife Titan.

t_ch: 全世之座，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，请结束您长久以来的沉默，给予人类庇护吧……
t_en: O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Throne of Worlds, please end your long silence and grant humanity protection...

t_ch: 解决掉主干道的敌人，剩下的交给圣城卫士，他们都是训练有素的精英。
t_en: Eliminate the enemies on the main road and leave the rest to the holy city's guards. They are all trained and experienced elites.

t_ch: 白厄阁下！刻法勒祝福你！
t_en: Lord Phainon! May Kephale bless you!

t_ch: 不要妄动，优先保护市民！
t_en: Don't be rash! Protect the citizens first!

t_ch: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，请回应吧……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, please answer our calls...

t_ch: 黄金裔，庇佑我们……
t_en: Chrysos Heirs, please protect us...

t_ch: 缇宁大人的预言示现了……
t_en: The prophecy of Lady Trinnon has come true...

t_ch: 胜利属于奥赫玛！
t_en: Victory belongs to Okhema!

t_ch: 我诅咒你，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}！
t_en: Curse you, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 奥赫玛永世唾弃你！
t_en: Okhema shall forever despise you!

t_ch: 冷静，维持阵型！
t_en: Stay calm, hold formation!

t_ch: 等待阿格莱雅大人的命令！
t_en: Wait for Lady Aglaea's orders!

t_ch: 按计划撤离，不要慌张。
t_en: Don't panic. Retreat according to the plan.

t_ch: 不能给英雄们添乱。
t_en: We mustn't cause more trouble for the heroes.

t_ch: 哈托努斯！坚持住——
t_en: Chartonus! Hang in there!

t_ch: 尽是些小打小闹。还不如你我死斗一场，余波就能震碎它们。
t_en: Mere child's play. A true fight between us would shatter them with the aftershocks alone.

t_ch: 你说我吗？
t_en: Are you talking to me?

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 住口，万敌！你想让圣城毁于一旦吗？
t_en: Enough, Mydei. Are you trying to destroy the holy city?

t_ch: 那是你的同伴？似乎不怎么友善。
t_en: Is he your companion? You two don't seem to be on friendly terms.

t_ch: 这就是黄金裔，世人眼中的英雄，却也是身负缺陷的凡人。
t_en: Well, that's the Chrysos Heirs. Revered as heroes by the masses, but still imperfect mortals at their core.

t_ch: 它们的敌意消失了？
t_en: Their hostility has ceased?

t_ch: 在死亡面前，纷争也会产生犹疑。我…是「死亡」的影子。
t_en: In the face of death, Strife will also cause hesitation to arise. I... am the shadow of death.

t_ch: 嗯…也有只凭气息难以压制的敌人。
t_en: Hmm... There are also some enemies who are difficult to subdue by presence alone.

t_ch: 一片死寂……
t_en: It's deathly silent...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}将死寂作为他骄伉的战鼓，这片水幕之后…就是战场。
t_en: Deathly silence is the proud resonance of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s war drums. Behind this watery veil... awaits the arena of conflict.

t_ch: 谁在哭喊？头好疼，要被撕裂了……
t_en: Who's wailing? My head feels as though it's being ripped apart...

t_ch: 坚持住！回想你的信仰，珍视的一切——如果做不到，就想象死亡吧，那反而能让你活下来！
t_en: Stay strong! Recall your convictions and everything you hold dear... If you can't do that, then think of death, for doing so might actually keep you alive!

t_ch: 小心！它的样子和我记忆中不同。
t_en: Careful! They look different from what I remember.

t_ch: 哪里变了？
t_en: How so?

t_ch: …更虚弱，但也更扭曲。
t_en: Weaker... but also more distorted.

t_ch: 二位，摒弃杂念——
t_en: Cast aside all distracting thoughts—

t_ch: 站在我身边，我会抵御它的怒火！
t_en: To me! I shall withstand their wrath!

t_ch: 就算是神明也会流血……
t_en: Even gods can bleed...

t_ch: 我来熄灭你的火种，泰坦！
t_en: I shall extinguish your Coreflame, Titan!

t_ch: 没完没了地爬出来，该如何脱身……
t_en: They just keep on coming, how do we break free from this...?

t_ch: 各位！后方已经安全了，请快去避难！
t_en: Everyone! The rear is safe, go, take shelter!

t_ch: 无需惊惶…无需恐惧……
t_en: No need to fear... No need to cower...

t_ch: 预言中的英雄会扫清命运的阴影，刻法勒的光辉会永远庇护奥赫玛……
t_en: The hero from the prophecy will sweep away the shadows of fate, and Kephale's light will always protect Okhema...

t_ch: 是冥河的气息……
t_en: It's the smell of the River of Souls...

t_ch: 休要靠近她……
t_en: Keep away from her...

t_ch: 塞纳托斯的指侍……
t_en: Servant of Thanatos...

t_ch: 无荣耀之死，不可……
t_en: A death without glory is no...

t_ch: 死亡的阴影…过去吧……
t_en: Shadow of Death... Begone...

t_ch: 阿格莱雅女士，可以稍等片刻吗？
t_en: Lady Aglaea, could you give us some time?

t_ch: 既然风波已经平息，我们想先完成一项使命：在此地留下「开拓」的信标。
t_en: We'd like to get back to our mission now that the situation has calmed down. We want to lay down a beacon of the Trailblaze here.

t_ch: 我向你保证，这不会带来任何负面的后果——请把它当作一种旅程的仪式。
t_en: I can assure you that this will not bring any repercussions to Okhema. Think of it as a ceremony when traveling to someplace new.
Beacon... of the Trailblaze...

t_ch: 无妨。两位请随意。
t_en: No problem, go ahead.

t_ch: 这样翁法罗斯也有「界域定锚」了——「开拓」的又一大步。
t_en: With this Space Anchor on Amphoreus, we've taken yet another giant step on the Path of Trailblaze.

t_ch: 胸前的车票更锃亮了！
t_en: Our boarding passes are appreciating in value!

t_ch: 再来几个，也许就能联系上列车了。
t_en: A few more, and maybe we can reconnect with the Express!

t_ch: 赞美阿维！
t_en: Praise Aki!

t_ch: …你想说阿基维利，对吧？
t_en: ...I'm going to assume you meant Akivili.

t_ch: 真是奇妙的启程礼。我对二位的来由越发好奇了。
t_en: What an interesting way to mark the start of your journey. I grow more and more curious about your cause.

t_ch: 但此刻，请允许我先尽到主人的礼仪…接下来的对话会有些漫长，两位贵客，我们找个适合聆听的地方。
t_en: But, please, let me first properly extend my hospitality to you... The conversation we must have will likely be quite lengthy, so why don't we go somewhere more suitable for that?

t_ch: 就这里吧。
t_en: This is a good place for our chat.

t_ch: 两位初来乍到，想必对人们口中的泰坦、黄金裔、神谕都满心疑虑。在回答具体的问题前，我想先向二位展现翁法罗斯的历史。
t_en: Both of you are new here, so it's only natural to be confused about the prophecy, Titans, and Chrysos Heirs that have been mentioned in passing. But I'd like you to learn about Amphoreus' history before I tell you more.

t_ch: 浴场的精灵正在跃动，这汪灵水是「海洋」泰坦的馈赠，它会带两位回到久远的过去。现在，请浸入浴池，聆听温暖的池水娓娓道来。
t_en: The bath sprites are excited to begin. This bath contains spirit water that has been blessed by the Ocean Titan. It can guide you back into the distant past. Go ahead, step in and listen to what the comforting ripples have to say.

t_ch: 一定要站在水中吗？
t_en: Do we really have to get into the water?

t_ch: 还有点不好意思。
t_en: This feels a little embarrassing.

t_ch: 请放心，如有必要…我会移开视线。
t_en: If it'll make you feel better... I can avert my gaze.

t_ch: 聆听浴场精灵的故事
t_en: Listen to the bath sprite's tale

t_ch: 沉静…感触远比字句更加真诚，也更善于解惑。闭上双眼，让暖流拥抱你，用肌肤聆听海的故事。
t_en: Quiet your thoughts... Feelings are far more honest than words and can better satisfy your curiosity. Close your eyes and feel the warm ripples of water embrace you. Feel the delivery of this account from the seas.

t_ch: 灵水会为你诠释，<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的前世今生。</color>
t_en: The spirit water shall show you <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus' distant and recent past</color>.

t_ch: 「好啦！坐好坐好，翁法罗斯的历史课要继续啦！」
t_en: "Okie doke, make yourself comfortable~ Time for a history class on Amphoreus!"

t_ch: 「起初，翁法罗斯是一团混沌！」
t_en: "Amphoreus started off as a ball of chaos!"

t_ch: 「然后，三位命运泰坦编织了世界法则；三位支柱泰坦创造了大地、海洋和天空；三位创生泰坦捏造了生命、你、我——」
t_en: "The three Fate Titans wrote laws to govern the world, another three Foundation Titans created the earth, ocean, and skies, and a different three Creation Titans designed and gave life to human beings — like you and me."

t_ch: 「——最后，三个坏蛋泰坦降临到世上，引发了恐怖的灾难！」
t_en: "But three baddie Titans soon snuck in, bringing a terrible horrible disaster with them!"

t_ch: 「泰坦们就震怒了，谁也不让谁，它们的子民也开始敌视对方、打打杀杀。」
t_en: "So, the Titans got angry, and no one was willing to give in. Their followers then decided to do the same, fighting and killing each other."

t_ch: 「这场神战持续了好久好久，给天上地上所有的生灵带去了不幸。直到有一天——发生了一件不得了的大事！」
t_en: "Everyone fought for a really, really long time, disturbing and hurting all people living in the world. Until one day — something big happened!"

t_ch: （期待地聆听）
t_en: (Listen eagerly.)

t_ch: 本人闪亮登场！
t_en: Yours truly descended upon your world!

t_ch: 「还没到你呢！课堂上禁止抢话！」
t_en: "It's not your turn! No interrupting me in class!"

t_ch: 「一道神谕出现了！它突然降临在翁法罗斯——」
t_en: "A prophecy appeared on Amphoreus! Something no one saw coming!"

t_ch: 「那三相的神谕说，只有一个办法可以结束这场战争——」
t_en: "The tripartite prophecy says there is only one way to stop this war."

t_ch: 「那就是召集一群强大的英雄，强大到能够挑战十二位泰坦，重新点亮它们的「火种」。这样一来，神的愤怒就会平息，世界就能回归和平。」
t_en: "Assemble a band of heroes powerful enough to take on the twelve Titans and reignite their Coreflames. Only then will their divine wrath abate, and peace return to the world."

t_ch: 「而这群英雄拥有一个共同的名字，还记得他们叫什么吗？没错——就是<color=#dbc291ff>黄金裔</color>！」
t_en: "We know this band of heroes by a certain name~ Any guesses? That's right! <color=#dbc291ff>The Chrysos Heirs</color>!"

t_ch: 「所以，大家明白了嘛？一定要吃饱喝好、坚持锻炼，这样长大后才有可能成为大英雄，为翁法罗斯献出自己的力量——」
t_en: "So, here's the takeaway: Eat well and train well, so you can grow up into a powerful hero and do your part for Amphoreus!"

t_ch: 嗯？这次…又发生什么了吗？
t_en: Hmm? Is... something else wrong?

t_ch: 它好像把我当成小孩了…
t_en: They're treating me like a child...

t_ch: 感觉童话里有点粉饰的成分。
t_en: Sounds like they might have glossed over some things.

t_ch: 这样啊…看来你是个很复杂的人呢，有些纯真，又有些敏锐。
t_en: Is that so... Looks like you're a bit hard to please. Trusting and perceptive at the same time.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯面临的困境不小啊。
t_en: Amphoreus seems to be going through a rough patch.

t_ch: 困境…多么柔婉的说法。
t_en: Rough patch... That's a mild way to put it.

t_ch: 泰坦…黄金裔…我还是不太明白。
t_en: I still don't get what's going on with the Titans and Chrysos Heirs...

t_ch: 看来我们习以为常的所有，在你眼中皆是混沌。想要捋顺世界的丝线，也许还得我亲自解答。
t_en: I suppose the things that are common knowledge to us are just a garbled mess to you. If we want to straighten out the threads of this world, perhaps I should explain things to you myself.

t_ch: 你们真的对天外一无所知？
t_en: Do you really know nothing about what's beyond the sky?

t_ch: 你的问句中夹杂着悲悯。内心深处，你或许已在宣判我们弱小无助。
t_en: I seem to hear a note of pity in that question. Perhaps you find us to be weak and defenseless.

t_ch: 那接下来呢…
t_en: So, what do we do now?

t_ch: 二位已经对翁法罗斯的历史有了基本的了解，接下来，我们就进入正题吧。请随我来。
t_en: We can move on to the problem at hand, now that both of you have some understanding of Amphoreus' history. Come with me.

t_ch: 请稍等片刻。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 发生什么了？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: 自此向上是议院赠予黄金裔的浴池。原本除了我的同袍，他人严禁踏足。
t_en: The way up from here leads to a bath that the Council granted exclusively to the Chrysos Heirs. The bath is strictly off limits to anyone other than the Heirs.

t_ch: 二位是来自天外的贵客，我愿为你们破例，但一次携两人前往…还是有违传统。
t_en: I'm willing to make an exception, considering you're guests from beyond the sky. But if I were to bring both of you in at once... I'd be blatantly disrespecting our traditions.

t_ch: 好神秘的规矩。
t_en: That's a puzzling custom.

t_ch: 这或许就是「英雄的特权」吧。
t_en: It's probably more of a "hero's privilege."

t_ch: 好严格的规矩。
t_en: That's a strict custom.

t_ch: 看来在奥赫玛，英雄和平民的地位并不对等。
t_en: Seems like prophesied heroes and civilians aren't treated equally in Okhema.

t_ch: 不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
t_en: Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.

t_ch: 你有一位温润知礼的伙伴。请来吧，贵客。
t_en: You have a very considerate partner. Follow me, then.

t_ch: 不要紧，{NICKNAME}，你先上去吧。我在这里等你。
t_en: Why don't you go up with her, {NICKNAME}? I don't mind waiting for you here.

t_ch: 请坐吧，{NICKNAME}。找一个舒适的姿态，然后闭上双眼。
t_en: Take a seat, {NICKNAME}. Make yourself comfortable, then close your eyes.

t_ch: 又要闭眼吗？
t_en: Close my eyes again?

t_ch: 有种不好的预感…
t_en: Why do I have a bad feeling about this...

t_ch: 这不是强迫，但…人们沐浴水中，本就是为了「坦诚相见」。你愿意相信我吗？
t_en: I won't force you, but... people hope to regard one another with bare honesty when they enter a bath. Are you willing to trust me?

t_ch: 坐下，然后闭上眼。
t_en: (Sit down and close your eyes.)

t_ch: …谢谢。然后，请往左侧挪动些，这样会更温暖。
t_en: ...Thank you. You can also move a little to your left. The water is warmer there.

t_ch: 听她的话，往左靠一靠。
t_en: (Follow her suggestion and move a little to your left.)

t_ch: 你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
t_en: You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.

t_ch: 我偏不。
t_en: (Refuse to move.)

t_ch: …你不信任我吗？
t_en: ...You don't trust me?

t_ch: 「我凭什么相信你呢？」这话第一时间自你的内心萌生。但无论如何，你和丹恒需要跟本地人搞好关系，完成「开拓」之旅。
t_en: "Why should I trust you?" That was your immediate response. However, you and Dan Heng need to build good relationships with the locals to complete your trailblazing journey.

t_ch: 「至少现在先配合一下，争取她的信任吧」——你如此说服自己。
t_en: "At least cooperate for now and try to earn her trust," you persuade yourself.

t_ch: 往左靠一靠。
t_en: (Move a little to your left.)

t_ch: 你向左侧移动了下身子。真是神奇，仅仅挪动几公分的距离，周身的水流却明显变得更加温暖了。
t_en: You move to the left. How wondrous — You've only moved a few centimeters, but the water around you has become distinctly warmer.

t_ch: 现在，请把左手放到桌台上，抬起小臂，手掌向前，五指微微张开……
t_en: Now place your left hand onto the bench. Lift your arm up with your palm facing forward, and part your fingers slightly...

t_ch: 照做。
t_en: (Do as she says.)

t_ch: 伸出右手。
t_en: (Extend your right arm instead.)

t_ch: 呵…我终于明白了，你并非怀疑我，只是想展露自己叛逆的一面。
t_en: ...I understand now. You do not really distrust me, you just wish to show your rebellious side.

t_ch: 你感到脸颊一热，随即切换了手。
t_en: You feel your cheeks warm up and quickly switch hands.

t_ch: 就是这样，很不错。补上迟来的自我介绍吧，我是「金织」阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的「黄金裔」之一。承蒙同袍信任，我暂时主持着黄金裔的行动。
t_en: Yes, you're doing great. Alright, it's about time I formally introduce myself: I am Aglaea the Goldweaver, dressmaster of Okhema and one of the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus. The trust placed in me is how I came to lead the Chrysos Heirs in our mission today.

t_ch: 虽说我的本职是织造华服，但私人时间，我最钟爱的却是这座浴场。归根结底，衣物是一种隔阂，掩藏起人的身躯和内心……
t_en: My duty may be to weave lavish robes, but I most enjoy coming to these baths in my personal time. Garments are shields after all, hiding both our bodies and what we truly think...

t_ch: 但在这里，我们尽可放下掩饰，流水会拉近你我的距离。
t_en: This place though, is where we can drop our cloaks of pretense, for the waters shall bring us closer together.

t_ch: 现在，你可以睁眼了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: You can open your eyes now, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 看，我们已连接在一起。
t_en: Look, we are joined together now.

t_ch: 这是什么仪式？
t_en: Wha... Is this some kind of ritual?

t_ch: 这么理解也无妨。
t_en: You're not wrong to think of it that way.

t_ch: 这是什么陷阱…
t_en: Wha... Is this some kind of trap?

t_ch: 陷阱？当然不是。请把它当作一种交流的仪式。
t_en: Trap? Hardly. Think of it as a ritual that allows us to communicate.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金线缠绕着你我，它能察觉到最细微的动摇，如此一来，我们便不能对彼此撒谎。
t_en: The golden threads of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} entwine us, capable of sensing even the slightest quiver. We are bound to speak the truth to each other this way.

t_ch: 接下来，我会告诉你此世的真相。相应的，我需要你回以一个小小的承诺。
t_en: You will learn the truth about this world from me, and in return, I ask for you to promise me something.

t_ch: 完成这一步交换，我才能允诺你们在翁法罗斯的旅程一帆风顺。
t_en: Fulfill this pact between us, and you can expect your journey on Amphoreus to be free of troubles.

t_ch: 继续说吧。
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 如果我无法承诺呢？
t_en: And if I can't promise?

t_ch: 感觉到了吗？金线起了波痕。它告诉我，你对奥赫玛的真诚尚存一丝怀疑，我必须消除这份顾虑。
t_en: Did you feel that? The golden threads are rippling. They reveal the distrust you still have for Okhema, and I take it upon myself to dispel these concerns.

t_ch: 方才，浴场精灵为你讲述了翁法罗斯的传说，但它们不愿揭示传说之下的残酷。
t_en: You learned the legends of Amphoreus from those bath sprites a while ago, but that was a sanitized version that spared you from the harsh and bitter realities of our history.

t_ch: ——曾经统治世界的泰坦众神，如今已成为腐蚀翁法罗斯的病因。某种<color=#dbc291ff>不可知的力量</color>改变了它们中的多数，招引来愤怒和疯狂。
t_en: The pantheon of Titans that once ruled our world has become the very affliction that eats away at Amphoreus. <color=#dbc291ff>An unfathomable power</color> changed something within most of these Titans, inducing their rage and madness.

t_ch: 而今，黑潮席卷全世，大地沉入永夜，唯有奥赫玛在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，保有最后一丝光明。
t_en: Amphoreus has since fallen into eternal night, the black tide engulfing our world. Okhema is now the only city to still receive light, and we owe it to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.

t_ch: 集结于此的黄金裔是世人唯一的希望。人们奉我们为英雄、守护者、救世主……
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs gathered here are Amphoreus' only hope. People hail us as heroes, as protectors, and as deliverers...

t_ch: …期盼我们击落众神，夺取火种，将神的权柄从王座上拉下，收敛于人类手中。
t_en: ...They are counting on us to vanquish the Titans, reclaim their Coreflames, topple them from their thrones, and take their authority for ourselves.

t_ch: 当所有的火种被集齐，创世的奇迹便会显现，破碎的世界将重获新生。
t_en: It is only upon reclaiming all Coreflames that the miracle of genesis can reveal itself, granting a new lease on life to this broken world.

t_ch: 这便是翁法罗斯的逐火之旅——「<color=#dbc291ff>一众英雄踏上弑神的旅途，摘得十二枚火种，实现再创世的伟业。</color>」
t_en: This is Amphoreus' Flame-Chase Journey — "<color=#dbc291ff>a band of heroes dedicated to slaying the gods and reclaiming the twelve Coreflames for the world to start over anew.</color>"

t_ch: 我们身陷末世，还需指引万千民众行向山顶。奥赫玛亟需更多盟友，成为我们坚实的助力。
t_en: With the end times before us, we are expected to lead all of our people toward the summit. Okhema needs as many allies as possible, to aid us in the upcoming battles.

t_ch: 也许，你们就是黄金裔在等待的「援军」。
t_en: The two of you may be just the "reinforcements" that the Chrysos Heirs have been waiting for.

t_ch: 你太高看我们了…
t_en: You think too highly of us...

t_ch: 可能我将希望放错了地方。但为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
t_en: If I'm putting my hopes in the wrong place, so be it. But for Amphoreus, I am willing to take the chance.

t_ch: 拯救世界是我们的专长。
t_en: Saving the world is what we do best.

t_ch: 你一定亲身经历过许多奇迹，才能毫无动摇地说出这句话。
t_en: You must have been blessed by many miracles to say that with such unwavering confidence.

t_ch: 或许是我有些心急…为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
t_en: I may be getting ahead of myself, but for Amphoreus, I am willing to take a chance on you.

t_ch: 我已对你袒露了心声。接下来，只想请你做出一句承诺。
t_en: I have laid my heart bare, and in return, I just want you to make a single promise.

t_ch: 请答应我：无论如何，<color=#dbc291ff>不要向市民透露「天外之界」的存在</color>。
t_en: Promise me to <color=#dbc291ff>never tell the people of Okhema about the worlds beyond the sky</color>, no matter what may happen.

t_ch: 这听起来不难。
t_en: Sounds doable.

t_ch: 很好。请见谅，奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
t_en: I'm glad to hear that. Please understand, Okhema is approaching its end, and I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: But why?

t_ch: 因为奥赫玛的时间已经不多，我不想给予人们虚假的希望…世人曾被它深深伤害。
t_en: Okhema is approaching its end. I do not wish to give my people false hope... Not when we've been badly scarred by it before.

t_ch: 你能答应我的请求吗？
t_en: Can you promise me that?

t_ch: 我发誓。
t_en: I promise.

t_ch: 我尽力…
t_en: I'll try...

t_ch: 为了「开拓」，我只能答应。
t_en: I have to, for the sake of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 如此一来，约定便完成了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. The agreement between us is now complete.

t_ch: 如果这场仪式令你感到不快，我向你致歉。但请理解…我不得不这么做。
t_en: I apologize if this ritual upset you, but I hope you understand... I had no other choice.

t_ch: 虽然很想听你说说自己的故事，不过现在…我已占用了你太久时间，丹恒先生似乎有些心急了，他的焦虑扰乱了水流。
t_en: As much as I am interested to hear your story, I'm afraid I've already taken up too much of your time... Mr. Dan Heng's worrying has created ripples in the water.

t_ch: 和他一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
t_en: Why don't the both of you tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.

t_ch: 和丹恒先生一同参观下「圣城」吧，看看人们是如何在困境中谋生的。晚些时候，我会为两位贵客准备好见面礼。
t_en: Why don't you and Mr. Dan Heng tour our "holy city"? See how our people make ends meet in this difficult time. I will have your welcome gifts ready later today.

t_ch: 总算回来了，她都和你说了什么？
t_en: You're finally back. What did she say to you?

t_ch: 转述此前的对话。
t_en: (Summarize your earlier conversation.)

t_ch: 将从阿格莱雅那里获得的信息，以及与她达成的约定转述给了丹恒……
t_en: Relay the information obtained from Aglaea and the agreement reached with her to Dan Heng...

t_ch: 没想到她唯一的顾虑，是担心我们向民众散布星际旅行的传闻。这倒和白厄在重渊的反应如出一辙。
t_en: Promise not to tell her people about our interstellar voyages... I didn't expect that to be her only concern. Though this is consistent with how Phainon was acting when we were at the Abyss.

t_ch: 这个世界的确有些奇怪。封闭如雅利洛-Ⅵ，当地人也对太空有着基本的认识，甚至知道命途和星神。
t_en: Something is definitely off about this world. Even on a planet as isolated as Jarilo-VI, the people still had an understanding of space, and even Paths and Aeons.

t_ch: 但在翁法罗斯，天空更像是…一座监牢，就连谈论天外都成了一种禁忌。明明有着如此先进的技术……
t_en: The sky above Amphoreus, though, is more like... a prison. They clearly have advanced technology, so who could imagine that even discussing what's beyond the sky would be taboo?

t_ch: 还记得那团遮蔽世界的混沌物质吗？我总有种预感，翁法罗斯是被人为封锁的。神话中的那些泰坦，也可能和某位星神有所关联。
t_en: Do you remember the mass of chaotic matter concealing Amphoreus from the rest of the universe? I can't help thinking that someone is intentionally keeping Amphoreus hidden. Their Titans could also be related to some Aeon.

t_ch: 真是迷雾重重啊。
t_en: This is indeed a foggy situation.

t_ch: 现在该怎么办？
t_en: What should we do now?

t_ch: 我只关心你的断枪…
t_en: I can't stop thinking about your broken spear...

t_ch: 白厄的意思是他会搞定。要是遇见了，就问问他吧。
t_en: Phainon promised to fix it. We can ask him about it when we see him.

t_ch: 先照阿格莱雅说的，四下看看吧。我们参与了圣城保卫战，趁着人们的印象分还在，可以向他们了解些信息。
t_en: Let's explore the city like Aglaea suggested. We helped defend the place, after all. This is a good chance to fish around for information while they still have a good impression of us.

t_ch: 顺道，也多拍几张照片留作记录。
t_en: We can also take some photos for our records.

t_ch: 请问，你们需要帮助吗？
t_en: Excuse me... Do you need help?

t_ch: 你们是？这身奇妙的衣服，还有没听过的口音……
t_en: You are...? What strange clothing and accent you have...

t_ch: 喔！你们就是白厄阁下从边疆带来的战士吧？
t_en: Oh! Are you the warriors that followed Lord Phainon back from the frontier?

t_ch: 边疆…？
t_en: The frontier...?

t_ch: 看来白厄也在帮阿格莱雅保守秘密，这是黄金裔的共识。
t_en: Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too. There must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 看来白厄也在保守秘密。
t_en: Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too.

t_ch: 嗯，这大概是黄金裔的共识。
t_en: Yes, there must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.

t_ch: 我们说话带口音？
t_en: We... speak with an accent?

t_ch: 比起这个，沟通之谜才是更大的问题。
t_en: That's nowhere near as puzzling as how we have a common tongue.

t_ch: 没错，是我们。
t_en: Yes, that's us.

t_ch: 太好了…听说两位身手不凡，和黄金裔一样神通广大，能请你们帮个忙，把这根石柱复原吗？
t_en: Thank goodness... I hear you're both exceptional warriors as masterful as the Chrysos Heirs. Could you help us restore this column here?

t_ch: 这倒霉日子，又是被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的喽啰入侵，又是被倒下的石柱挡在家门口…真是没法过了。
t_en: Nothing has been going right these days. First those minions of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} attack, and now this column collapses right outside our home... Can we really keep going?

t_ch: 复原？只靠人力，这得修上两三天吧。
t_en: Restore it...? With just human effort, that's going to take a couple of days, at least.

t_ch: ——当然不能靠「人力」啦。
t_en: Not with human effort, of course, silly!

t_ch: 缇宝大人！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，这样就不用劳烦二位英雄了。
t_en: High Priest Tribbie! O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} on high, our prayers are heard! We won't need to trouble you any further, kind warriors.

t_ch: 原来如此，他以为我们也会召唤「神迹」。
t_en: Oh... He thought we could summon miracles.

t_ch: 之前是有种奇怪的感觉…
t_en: I did feel something strange in me...

t_ch: 咦，你是说刚到奥赫玛那会儿吗？这么一说，*我们*当时也觉得有点奇怪。
t_en: Eh? When we all arrived in Okhema? Come to think of it, we felt something a bit odd, too.

t_ch: 翻越雅努斯的万千门径…
t_en: Surmount the myriad passages of Janus...

t_ch: 咦，你怎么也念上啦？说起来，刚到奥赫玛那会儿，你是不是也这么做了？
t_en: Eh? You can recite this, too? Wait, did you also chant this when we arrived in Okhema?

t_ch: 莫非，你也有学习<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯祷言</color>的资质？
t_en: Maybe... you also have the ability to learn <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's prayers</color>, too?

t_ch: 这种资质很少见吗？
t_en: Is that rare?

t_ch: 完全不哦！祭司可是很常见的，只是天赋有高有低。
t_en: Not at all! We have lots of priests here, but some are more gifted than others.

t_ch: 这样吧，不如两位也来尝试一下——让缇宝老师来看看你们悟性如何！
t_en: Why don't you both try chanting? Tribbie will see if you get it!

t_ch: 哇…{NICKNAME}真是天赋异禀，一教就会！
t_en: Wow... {NICKNAME} got it on the first try! You're a natural!

t_ch: 奇迹…活生生的奇迹！传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
t_en: A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven! Go, bring word to the bard: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...

t_ch: 太对了，哥。
t_en: Well said, my friend!

t_ch: 翁法罗斯也有新闻学？
t_en: They also teach journalism here in Amphoreus?
